reviews.comment:

Good place to take a break during your trip.

reviews.comment:
Estuve en la confitería. La atencion muy pobre. En la gasolineria peor aun.

(Translated by Google)
I was at the confectionery shop. The service was very poor. It was even worse at the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaGV5M3VnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente de los playeros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention from the beach attendants
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdWR5NGtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está excelente esta YPF. Súper práctica para parar camino a la costa, sin importar si vas a seguir por la ruta 2 o a agarrar la 63.
Lo único malo es que los precios del full son medio un robo

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station is excellent. Super convenient for stopping on the way to the coast, whether you're continuing on Route 2 or taking Route 63. The only downside is that the full tank prices are a bit of a rip-off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMmNmNEx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, había mucha gente y sobretodo seguían con buena onda , eso para destacar, todo lo que pedimos estuvo rico y el lugar afuera para tomar o comer ideal .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, there were a lot of people and above all they were still very friendly, that's worth highlighting, everything we ordered was delicious and the place outside to drink or eat was ideal.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbVoyWkFREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.  Completa y muy buena atención de los chicos. Recomendó el café!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The staff were thorough and very helpful. I highly recommend the coffee!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbWI3UnV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El gas rinde de 10 ... los precios del café y medialunas carísimos. ( un choreo ).carga gas y segui.con el termo.

(Translated by Google)
Gas is worth 10... the prices of coffee and croissants are very expensive. (a choreo). Load gas and continue with the thermos.
